topics.title: Overhead (Top-Down) View Toggle
topics.summary: Press `O` to toggle a flat top-down view of the snake game board, zeroing camera angles and block height; restores prior settings on exit.

topics.title: Chore: Ignore .jolli Directory
topics.summary: The .jolli directory is excluded from version control via a project-level ignore rule added in commit 31d93c3f.

topics.title: Documentation: Consolidate READMEs and Update Feature List
topics.summary: README rewritten from source inventory; README2/3 deleted; CLAUDE.md added with Jolli Memory guidance.

topics.title: Iron Snake Mode: Random Board Shapes with Level Goals
topics.summary: Optional mode replacing the square grid with irregular random board shapes and a cumulative score-based level progression system.

topics.title: Bot Fix: Infinite Loop / Oscillation and Starvation Timer
topics.summary: Loop guard breaks bot oscillation cycles via revisit + confinement detection; starvation timer ends games when bots wander indefinitely without eating.
